---
title: "Antisimplistic"
subtitle: "Precise. Testable. Teachable."
about:
  template: solana
  links:
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/olearydj
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/djoleary
    - icon: twitter
      text: Twitter
      href: https://twitter.com/antisimplistic
---

Lecturer in Industrial and Systems Engineering at Auburn University. Recovering entrepreneur, second-career academic, relentless tinkerer. After 25 years building games and interactive products at companies I built and ran (n-Space, GUNSTRUCTION), I now teach product development, data science, and machine learning.

## On this site

### Articles

- [Terminally Curious Blog](/blog.html) - Writing on DS/ML, AI-assisted development, tools, and teaching
- [Why Antisimplistic?](/posts/2025-10-03-why-antisimplistic/) - The name and philosophy behind it
- [About](/about.html) - More about me

## Publications

- [PhD Dissertation (HTML)](/dissertation/) - Augmented vs. Traditional Instruction in Manufacturing Assembly: An Affordance-Based, Multi-Modal Assessment of Learning, Recall, and Retention (2024)
